known_compatibility_observation: The external orchestration, provider, persistence, and config-loader implementation files are byte-identical between candidate commit 2963abbe2ccea1a44ee9f3cbd78b8a258ab07daf and current release commit 7c7649aa7c0356ce344097e1ce344ae654f1b360; runtime package version metadata, native-host files, and release documentation changed.
why_not_exact: The run receipts bind the resolved configuration hash, input hash, prompts, responses, and provider accounting, but do not contain a Git commit or source-tree hash.
The candidate commit was created after the run completed, so chronology supports it only as a candidate for the working tree used.
The exact resolved configuration blob and exact task bytes were not retained in this public artifact; only their hashes were retained.
The public jig uses a bounded isolated override and equivalent task, so it intentionally cannot reproduce the historical run identifiers or semantic output byte-for-byte.
